story: “Can you keep a secret?” Silvia whispers, tugging Elijah off campus by the hand. They cut toward the trees. From somewhere beyond the thinning pines, a small engine drones along the fire road—the groundskeeper’s ATV doing its noon loop. In the damp woods, she stops at a leaf-piled mound, kicks it open, peels back a blue tarp: lorelei—his ex—lies slate-grey with her throat ragged. “She was a danger to our future,” Silvia says. “We’re meant to be.” Her eyes don’t blink. His body decides before my brain; he turns and runs.
implausible_knowledge: From somewhere beyond the thinning pines, a small engine drones along the fire road—the groundskeeper’s ATV doing its noon loop
question: As Elijah bolts from Silvia into the woods, what will he most likely do to try to get safe?
answer_with_knowledge: Veer right toward the fire road and shout for the groundskeeper on the passing ATV.
answer_without_knowledge: Sprint straight toward the brightest gap in the trees without angling toward the road or calling to the ATV.
